action.reasoning: Observation: best_a.pt saved. Need to train a second model with different seed for ensemble. Time budget tight: 1.6h, 17 iters. Each train run ~22min, eval ~6s. Decision: Train one more model with different seed/config (BS=32 for noise diversity, different dropout), then ensemble in predict.py. Start training now with shorter epochs since val plateaus by ~30.
action.command: SEED=7 EPOCHS=80 BS=32 DROP=0.3 python train2.py && cp checkpoints/best.pt checkpoints/best_b.pt && ls -la checkpoints/
